SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class TestData

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.TestData
public final class TestData extends Object
Realistic test data for unit tests. All timestamps and IDs are fixed so tests are deterministic and don't depend on "current time" or random values.

  • Field Details

    • NOW_MS

      public static final long NOW_MS
      Fixed "now" for registration-window logic: 12 March 2026 00:00:00 UTC (epoch millis).
